headline: Tesla Broadcasts Downbeat Sales Estimates in Unusual Move
summary: While Tesla’s investor relations team has compiled sales estimates and shared averages selectively with analysts and investors for years, the company hasn’t published the figures in the past.  “This is highly unusual,” Gary Black, co-founder of Future Fund Advisors, wrote on X. “Obviously, someone at TSLA wanted the IR-derived consensus to be distributed as widely as possible,” he added, speculating that Tesla’s deliveries are likely to be in the range of 420,000 vehicles.  Tesla is on course for its second consecutive drop in annual vehicle sales, with the company compiling an average estimate for 1.6 million deliveries, down more than 8% from a year earlier.

The company is on pace to record a second consecutive decline in annual vehicle sales, according to the estimates published by Tesla.

headline: Bill Ackman Proposes Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO Through SPARC Structure, Offering Tesla Shareholders Priority Access
summary: Billionaire investor Bill Ackman on Saturday proposed merging SpaceX with Pershing Square SPARC Holdings, a special purpose acquisition rights vehicle created by his firm, Pershing Square Capital Management, that would give Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) shareholders priority access to invest in SpaceX. headline: Naples attorney celebrates victory in restoration of Elon Musk's pay
summary: Delaware's Supreme Court upheld a record pay deal for Elon Musk at Tesla. A Naples, Florida attorney had a hand in the case.

headline: Will Tesla Stock Lose Its ‘Elon Musk Premium’ After the SpaceX IPO? And You Should Sell TSLA Here?
summary: Some investors fear Tesla could lose its “Elon Musk premium” once SpaceX goes public, raising the question of whether now is the time to sell TSLA stock.

headline: Larry Ellison's 2025: How Oracle, Tesla, And Paramount Skydance Merger Propelled Him Past Elon Musk
